name: TTN Sports
purpose: Live sports commentary, analysis, fan culture, and matchday city coverage
audience: Sports fans, stadium overflow crowds, watch-party venues, city partners
revenue_model: Sponsor activations, QR drops, partner venue placements, sponsor proof reports
web3_utility: Proof-of-view badges, Solana moment drops, sponsor QR claims, attendance proof

name: TTN Music
purpose: Local artists, live performances, music culture, and city music scenes
audience: Music fans, local community, event attendees, venue partners
revenue_model: Sponsor placements, creator monetization, venue partnerships
web3_utility: Artist supporter passes, digital collectibles, proof-of-attendance for shows

name: TTN Creators
purpose: Independent creators, vloggers, content builders, and community shows
audience: Creator economy, influencers, content fans, brand partners
revenue_model: Creator revenue share, channel memberships, brand integrations
web3_utility: Creator supporter passes, token-gated content, digital collectibles

name: TTN Charity
purpose: Nonprofit storytelling, campaign launches, and transparent impact reporting
audience: Donors, community partners, social impact brands, cause-driven audiences
revenue_model: Sponsor-funded charity campaigns, matching programs, brand CSR integrations
web3_utility: Charity campaign receipts, proof-of-donation on Solana, impact badge drops

name: TTN Local
purpose: Neighborhood news, community events, and local business spotlights
audience: Local residents, community members, neighborhood businesses, city partners
revenue_model: Local merchant advertising, community sponsorships, neighborhood business packages
web3_utility: Local business badge drops, community proof-of-attendance, neighborhood passes

name: TTN Business
purpose: Entrepreneur content, financial education, business culture, and deal flow
audience: Entrepreneurs, investors, business professionals, emerging brands
revenue_model: B2B sponsorships, professional service ads, premium content partnerships
web3_utility: Sponsor QR claims, on-chain sponsor proof reports, business credentialing

name: TTN Events
purpose: Live event coverage, conferences, festivals, sports, and city activations
audience: Event attendees, remote viewers, event sponsors, city brands
revenue_model: Event sponsor packages, branded coverage deals, partner venue packages
web3_utility: Proof-of-attendance NFTs, event moment drops, sponsor claim badges

name: TTN Web3
purpose: Blockchain education, DeFi culture, crypto literacy, and on-chain analytics content
audience: Web3 natives, builders, curious newcomers, protocol teams
revenue_model: Web3 native sponsorships, token-gated premium content, protocol partnerships
web3_utility: Token-gated clips, on-chain community passes, protocol showcase drops
